from: Creative-writing repo has prose micro-branch postcards and examples but no machine-checkable intent record attached to an active branch.
to: Have a single, schema-validated micro-branch intent object for this branch that has been lightly maintained across sessions and now feels stable enough that the branch can be treated as complete.
route: For this pass, confirm that this intent object still matches reality, bump updatedAt, validate once against micro-branch-intent-object-v0.1.json, and then leave the branch ready to be merged or simply parked.
